scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c green,cyan "npm.cmd --prefix backend run dev" "npm.cmd --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.dev:clean: npm.cmd run kill:3000 && npm.cmd run kill:5173 && npm.cmd run dev
scripts.dev:backend:clean: npm.cmd run kill:3000 && npm.cmd run dev:backend
scripts.dev:frontend:clean: npm.cmd run kill:5173 && npm.cmd run dev:frontend
scripts.build: npm.cmd --prefix backend run build && npm.cmd --prefix frontend run build
